seoTitle: Gumlu vs Gundiah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gumlu and Gundiah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gumlu and Gundiah.
heading: Gumlu vs Gundiah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gumlu, Queensland and Gundiah, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gundiah has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Gumlu (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gumlu or Gundiah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gumlu has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Gundiah scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gumlu scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Gundiah scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gumlu or Gundiah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gundiah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
